hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */go.sum) echo 'BLOCKED: go.sum should not be edited directly. Use go mod tidy.' >&2; exit 1 ;; esac
filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in *.go) golangci-lint run --fix "$(dirname "$filepath")/..." 2>/dev/null; true ;; esac
filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in *.go) go test "$(dirname "$filepath")/..." -count=1 -short 2>&1 | tail -5; true ;; esac
